feature.name: WebGPU: 'primitive_index' feature
feature.creator: bajones@chromium.org
feature.summary: This feature adds a new optional capability to WebGPU that exposes a new WGSL shader builtin, 'primitive_index'. This builtin provides a per-primitive index to fragment shaders on supported hardware, similar to the existing vertex_index and instance_index builtins. The primitive index is useful for advanced graphical techniques, such as virtualized geometry.
